highItems.text: Add !research [topic] command to JARVIS — topic-agnostic synthesis pipeline → #intel
highItems.full: Add !research [topic] command to JARVIS in scripts/jarvis.js. When triggered via Slack Socket Mode, invoke the 3-tier Media Intel pipeline against the given topic, synthesize a structured research brief, and post to #intel (C0AU4M74A7Q). Create a research-prompt.md template in prompts/ following async-prompt.md convention. Include error handling and Slack acknowledgement on receipt. Topic-agnostic: accepts freeform query string, NOT a fixed source list (different from !tech and !iab).

highItems.text: EIDR backfill Phase 1b — populate parent_keys.eidr_id column. agents/eidr-agent.js + cre…
highItems.full: EIDR backfill Phase 1b — populate parent_keys.eidr_id column. agents/eidr-agent.js + creds already exist. Bulk loop over 589,814 matched IMDB tconsts resolving to EIDR IDs. Rate-limit (EIDR API throttles; target ≤5 rps). Output: new `parent_keys/v1b/YYYY-MM-DD/movies.parquet` with eidr_id column populated where match found. Match-rate baseline TBD (likely 60–85% for studio-released films). Skip TMDB fallback keys (tmdb_mov_*) as EIDR has no TMDB join surface.
highItems.sprint: Sprint 5 — S3 Data Lake & Phase 1b completion (added 2026-04-22 05:00)

highItems.text: TMDB Collections loader — job `tmdb-collections` · ~8.5K calls · ~5 min. DuckDB pre-pass…
highItems.full: TMDB Collections loader — job `tmdb-collections` · ~8.5K calls · ~5 min. DuckDB pre-pass already confirmed 8,522 unique `belongs_to_collection.id` in movies NDJSON. Fetches `/collection/{id}?append=images`. Ready to run as soon as main loader settles or idles.
highItems.sprint: Sprint 6 — TMDB full-ingest continuation chain (autonomous, armed 2026-04-22 06:28)

highItems.text: TMDB Networks loader — job `tmdb-networks` · ~5K calls · ~3 min. BLOCKED until tv_series…
highItems.full: TMDB Networks loader — job `tmdb-networks` · ~5K calls · ~3 min. BLOCKED until tv_series phase completes (DuckDB needs full tv_series NDJSON to extract unique network IDs). Fetches `/network/{id}?append=alternative_names,images`.
highItems.sprint: Sprint 6 — TMDB full-ingest continuation chain (autonomous, armed 2026-04-22 06:28)

highItems.text: TMDB Companies loader — job `tmdb-companies` · ~50K calls · ~25 min. BLOCKED until tv_se…
highItems.full: TMDB Companies loader — job `tmdb-companies` · ~50K calls · ~25 min. BLOCKED until tv_series phase completes (DuckDB UNION over movies + tv_series production_companies). Fetches `/company/{id}?append=alternative_names,images`.
highItems.sprint: Sprint 6 — TMDB full-ingest continuation chain (autonomous, armed 2026-04-22 06:28)

highItems.text: TMDB TV Seasons loader — job `tmdb-tv-seasons` · ~700K calls · ~5h. BLOCKED until tv_ser…
highItems.full: TMDB TV Seasons loader — job `tmdb-tv-seasons` · ~700K calls · ~5h. BLOCKED until tv_series phase completes (DuckDB UNNEST tv_series.seasons[] → (series_id, season_number) pairs). Fetches `/tv/{id}/season/{n}?append=external_ids,videos,images`.
highItems.sprint: Sprint 6 — TMDB full-ingest continuation chain (autonomous, armed 2026-04-22 06:28)

highItems.text: TMDB TV Episodes flatten — job `tmdb-tv-episodes` · 0 TMDB calls · ~3 min. BLOCKED until…
highItems.full: TMDB TV Episodes flatten — job `tmdb-tv-episodes` · 0 TMDB calls · ~3 min. BLOCKED until TV Seasons done. DuckDB UNNEST seasons.episodes (~2M TMDB episodes across 300K series) + LEFT JOIN imdb/title_episode parquet (9.6M superset) to populate imdb_id. Saves ~2M would-be API calls.
highItems.sprint: Sprint 6 — TMDB full-ingest continuation chain (autonomous, armed 2026-04-22 06:28)

highItems.text: TMDB Movie Enrichment backfill — job `tmdb-movie-backfill` · ~1.18M calls · ~10h. BLOCKE…
highItems.full: TMDB Movie Enrichment backfill — job `tmdb-movie-backfill` · ~1.18M calls · ~10h. BLOCKED until main loader fully idle (people phase complete) to avoid rate-limit contention. Sidecar-only: writes watch/providers+videos+reviews+images for the 1.18M pre-v2 movies to `tmdb_dev/movies_enrichment/YYYY-MM-DD/`. Never touches existing `tmdb_dev/movies/`.
highItems.sprint: Sprint 6 — TMDB full-ingest continuation chain (autonomous, armed 2026-04-22 06:28)
